videos.title: #ACTIVE - Amashova Race Launch 2018: Gran Fondo World Tour
videos.description: The Amashova Durban Classic race will form part of the Gran Fondo World Tour, making it the first and only race in the prestigious ten race line-up to be hosted in Africa.
